scope: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 (unpushed code pattern) + BUGFIX-027 double reward + BUGFIX-028 echo_memory + feat 3rd GM few-shot + PROGRESS_MISSION parser

bugs_found.description: Double reward application: C16 claimed BUGFIX-026 was fixed but code was NEVER PUSHED (only status JSONs committed). _effects.apply_run_rewards() still present at L666, called AFTER StoreRun.handle_run_end() already applied rewards via dispatch. Player gets 2x Anam, 2x total_runs, 2x run_history entries, 2x biome_runs, 2x echo_memory updates.
bugs_found.fix: Removed _effects.apply_run_rewards() call from controller. StoreRun.handle_run_end() is the single source of truth for reward application.

bugs_found.description: C16 claimed echo_memory was wired into LLM context but code was NEVER PUSHED. build_context_enrichment() was missing echo_memory, tension_zone, convergence_zone, and total_runs data. Cross-run narrative callbacks (veteran status, biome death memories, faction patterns) were not reaching the LLM.
bugs_found.fix: Added tension_zone/convergence_zone/echo_memory/total_runs to build_narrative_context(). Enhanced build_context_enrichment() with MOS convergence hints, veteran detection, biome death memory, and dominant faction tracking.

bugs_found.description: PROGRESS_MISSION effects from GM LLM were silently dropped by _try_parse_effects_dict(). The validator required 'amount' key but PROGRESS_MISSION uses 'step'. Any GM-generated card with PROGRESS_MISSION fell through to the HEAL_LIFE fallback.
bugs_found.fix: Added explicit PROGRESS_MISSION handler in _try_parse_effects_dict() with step validation (clampi 1-3).

overall_assessment: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 exposed the same unpushed-code pattern as C8/C9 — 2 HIGH bugs still active despite status files claiming fixed. All 3 bugs fixed + feature (3rd GM few-shot with PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings). 28 total bugs fixed across 17 cycles. CRITICAL PATTERN: MCP push_files calls sometimes only include status JSONs, not code files. Must verify code presence on main after every push.
